source_native_compact.title: Source-native compacting
source_native_compact.preserved_anchors: Original structure, local terminology, author organization
source_native_compact.intended_use: Skills whose structure already encodes a useful workflow.

api_code.title: API/code anchoring
api_code.preserved_anchors: Imports, API calls, object construction, commands, executable snippets
api_code.intended_use: Code- or tool-heavy skills where API details prevent debugging.

rule_formula.title: Rule/formula anchoring
rule_formula.preserved_anchors: Definitions, formulas, thresholds, schemas, units, conventions
rule_formula.intended_use: Scientific, optimization, and rule-governed tasks requiring exact invariants.

workflow.title: Workflow guarding
workflow.preserved_anchors: Ordered steps, validation checks, constraints, pitfalls, recovery cues
workflow.intended_use: Tasks prone to missing checks or procedural drift.
